page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Super-focus: a tool for agile functional analysis of shotgun metagenomic data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: An agile homology-based approach using a reduced SEED database to report the subsystems present in metagenomic samples and profile their abundances.
